proposals.rationale: Fetched CXG::scRNA-seq::BHLHE40 knockdown: 48,000 cells × 22,000 genes. Mito ≤ 12.0%, doublets 4.00%. Ready for downstream.
BHLHE40 knockdown is linked to pathways ['unknown']; 0 expected-up and 0 expected-down genes.
scGPT — 33M cells; supports perturbation head out of the box. Plus a small perturbation adapter head.
Adamw + lr=0.0003 for 10 epochs on scGPT with batch=128; by_donor CV, early stop on val_loss_plateau_3.
DEG overlap@K=1.00, held-out AUROC=0.80, calibration=0.95. Negative control AUROC=0.50 (should be ≈0.5).
